mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_reservation ( room_id, user_id, start_datetime, end_datetime, status, total_price, memo, payment_status, payment_id, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{memo}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentId}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_reservation SET status = #{status}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, memo = #{memo}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_id = #{paymentId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rental_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_datetime DESC
SELECT * FROM rental_reservation WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 AND status IN ('REQUESTED', 'CONFIRMED') AND ( (start_datetime < #{end} AND end_datetime > #{start}) )
